title: S5: Acceptance & Integration Sprint
intent: Implement IC-1 (restriction monotonicity), IC-2 (snapshot determinism), IC-3 (delegation non-escalation) as real CI enforcement gates. Run end-to-end integration verification: load module via ModuleLoader → enable via governance APIs → execute via gate → verify decision log queryable. Remove the remaining CI stub. Mark all five IC checks as IMPLEMENTED in tools/ci/invariant-checks.md. This sprint confirms v0.1 readiness.
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
